## 🔬 Deep Research
⚡ Quick Summary
Cyber Security Services (CSS) is an independent U.S. cybersecurity consulting firm (est. 2014) that provides penetration testing, virtual CISO, incident response, SOC operations, and compliance services (SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI, etc.) to help organizations identify security gaps and meet regulatory requirements.
